# FlowOps Lab

FlowOps Lab sells same-day, tightly scoped technical work with public proof, plain boundaries, and direct USDT/USDC payment on EVM.

## Primary Intake

- Request form: https://polyflow-samples.netlify.app/services.html#request
- Telegram proof channel: https://t.me/PolyFlowSamples
- Public wallet for USDT/USDC on EVM: 0x8B9D88f5868B5D576524Abd53a4325F120e9aD2b
- Confirm the EVM network before sending payment.

## $50 Offers

### OSS bounty / CI patch sprint

- Price: $50 USDT/USDC
- Page: https://polyflow-samples.netlify.app/oss-bounty-patch.html
- Form name: oss-bounty-patch-request
- Good fit: one public repository issue, CI repair, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Makefile target, tests, sample validation, or workflow glue.
- Deliverable: one patch-ready change, local verification commands and results, maintainer handoff notes, and scope limits.
- Public proof patch: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/flowopslab/flowopslab/main/bounties/qtop-433-ci-sample-validation.patch

### OSS bounty review / fix sprint

- Price: $50 USDT/USDC
- Good fit: one public bounty issue or open PR needing checklist review, maintainer handoff, smoke-test planning, Godot/GDScript review-assist, or a narrow follow-up patch.
- Deliverable: requirement mapping, PR review surface summary, merge blocker notes, and optional small fix patch for confirmed gaps.
- Public proof review: https://github.com/flowopslab/flowopslab/blob/main/bounties/openisopix-pr3-review.md

### AI automation / DevOps triage sprint

- Price: $50 USDT/USDC
- Page: https://polyflow-samples.netlify.app/services.html
- Form name: service-request
- Good fit: GitHub Actions failures, Python automation scripts, agent workflow glue, CI smoke-test gaps, n8n/webhook handoffs, or DevOps runbook cleanup.
- Deliverable: root-cause note, one narrow patch or workflow design where possible, verification commands/results, and handoff checklist.

### Web research / lead-list QA sprint

- Price: $50 USDT/USDC
- Page: https://polyflow-samples.netlify.app/services.html
- Form name: service-request
- Good fit: web research, lead-list QA, competitor/source scan, public company-list cleanup, or one small data verification batch.
- Deliverable: deduplicated list, source links, status/fit notes, missing-field flags, and a short methodology note.

### Spreadsheet QA / Google Sheets evaluator sprint

- Price: $50 USDT/USDC
- Page: https://polyflow-samples.netlify.app/services.html
- Form name: service-request
- Good fit: spreadsheet QA, Excel evaluator tasks, Google Sheets evaluator tasks, formula audits, workbook quality checks, duplicate checks, and source-linked cleanup.
- Deliverable: issue list, formula/formatting notes, cleaned sample rows where useful, source links, and a concise QA handoff.

### n8n workflow automation sprint

- Price: $50 USDT/USDC
- Page: https://polyflow-samples.netlify.app/n8n-automation.html
- Form name: n8n-automation-request
- Sample workflow JSON: https://polyflow-samples.netlify.app/n8n-lead-router-workflow.json

### Same-day small automation or data cleanup

- Price: $25 starter job or $50 full focused setup
- Page: https://polyflow-samples.netlify.app/services.html
- Form name: service-request

## Boundaries

- Public wallet address is allowed and intentionally public.
- Keep private keys, seed phrases, production secrets, payment card data, medical records, and full sensitive customer exports out of the request.
- Work is scoped before delivery. Historical market-flow reports are not financial advice, betting advice, or profit guarantees.
